items.title: Trump again centers crime in immigration debate with White House vigil
items.description: The vigil centered victims’ families and crime in defense of the president’s deportation campaign, even as public support for his approach softens.

items.title: Supreme Court to consider whether states can sue over greenhouse gas emissions

items.title: FBI Director Kash Patel defends partying with U.S. Olympic ice hockey team
items.description: Videos of Patel celebrating in Italy went viral Sunday night, prompting criticism and questions about his judgment during a critical time for the FBI.
